description: Salvage and Rebuilt Title — processes branded title applications for salvage, rebuilt, and flood-damaged vehicles with enhanced inspection requirements

hard_stops.label: Rebuild Inspection Not Completed
hard_stops.logic: Vehicle has not passed a state-authorized rebuild inspection — rebuilt title cannot be issued without certified inspection

hard_stops.label: Stolen Parts Identified
hard_stops.logic: One or more replacement parts VINs or serial numbers match NCIC stolen parts database — law enforcement referral required

hard_stops.label: Anti-Theft Inspection Failed
hard_stops.logic: Vehicle failed the anti-theft component verification — VIN plates, major component labels, or federal safety certification label discrepancies found

soft_flags.label: Flood Damage Brand from Another State
soft_flags.logic: Vehicle has a flood damage brand from another jurisdiction — verify all electrical and safety systems were inspected during rebuild

soft_flags.label: High Repair Cost Ratio
soft_flags.logic: Documented repair costs exceed 90% of pre-loss value — additional structural integrity inspection recommended
